title: Dubai Sports
summary: Dubai Sports is a 24/7 sports channel based in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. The channel started in 1998 to be the home for sports news around the country and was awarded the privilege of showing different sports events locally and worldwide. It is one of the channels of Dubai Media Incorporated. It is well known for broadcasting Bundesliga from 2005 to 2015 for free in MENA. Currently, Dubai Sports is the home of Dutch Football.
text:
Dubai Sports is a 24/7 sports channel based in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. The channel started in 1998 to be the home for sports news around the country and was awarded the privilege of showing different sports events locally and worldwide. It is one of the channels of Dubai Media Incorporated. It is well known for broadcasting Bundesliga from 2005 to 2015 for free in MENA. Currently, Dubai Sports is the home of Dutch Football.
